name: Handshake-Success-Rate (HSR)
description: Percentage of inter-agent transfer points completed with valid context packets and accepted by the receiving role on first or corrected attempt.
goalMapping: Tracks collaboration quality and transfer reliability across global workflows.

escalation_policy.on_critical: Freeze new global handshakes and escalate to Director with root-cause summary.
escalation_policy.on_warning: Trigger handoff integrity review and additional context validation.
